tr.td: Abuse-Deterrent 12 HR Oxycodone Hydrochloride 10 MG Extended Release Oral Tablet [Oxycontin]
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Acetaminophen 300 mg and codeine phosphate 15 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/15 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Hydrocodone bitartrate 10 mg and ibuprofen 200 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg/200 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/5 mg) by mouth every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

Finding of vomiting (finding)
Eruption of skin (disorder)

ul.li: Increase patient knowledge about hypertension, its risks, and lifestyle modifications to support blood pressure control
Maintain systolic blood pressure below 130 mmHg and diastolic blood pressure below 80 mmHg

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
